hooks.command: f=/tmp/claude-bash-batch-guard; now=$(date +%s%N); if [ -f "$f" ]; then last=$(cat "$f" 2>/dev/null || echo 0); delta=$(( (now - last) / 1000000 )); if [ "$delta" -lt 1500 ]; then echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","permissionDecision":"deny","permissionDecisionReason":"Parallel Bash batch blocked: another Bash call fired <1.5s ago. Run ONE Bash command at a time and wait for its result before the next."}}'; exit 0; fi; fi; echo "$now" > "$f"
